title: Skinpls
body:
Use skins on offline servers. Supports skins from Mojang API (enter a username to get skin) or mineskin.org.

- `/skinpls mojang <username>`
- `/skinpls mineskin <uuid>`

Be warned, this mod is basically a prototype. While it works, it's not polished at all and graceful error-handling is non-existent.
